forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 58. West wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 67, with temperatures falling to around 65 in the afternoon. West wind 7 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

weather_report:
The night in Downtown San Francisco wraps the city in a soft blanket of clouds, the air carrying a gentle chill as it hovers around 58 degrees. The west wind whispers through the streets, offering a peaceful respite from the bustling day. As dawn unfurls tomorrow, expect a transformation: the clouds will part and let the warm embrace of the sun work its magic. With a high nearing 67 degrees, the day promises a comfortable warmth—even if the afternoon may coax temperatures back toward 65, aided by a playful breeze.

Given these conditions, it’s wise to dress in layers. A light sweater or jacket will serve as your companion in the cooler morning hours, easily shed as the sun raises the spirits of those wandering through the day. While the fog may linger along the coastline, casting a gentle haze over the iconic Golden Gate Bridge, the heart of the city will sparkle under the sun's rays. Perhaps a stroll along one of the quieter parks is in order, taking in the majesty around you: the iconic architecture and the gentle hum of life returning to the streets. This is a day perfect for savoring a cup of coffee at a tucked-away café, or perhaps an afternoon visit to a gallery, soaking in the vibrant pulse of urban artistry against the backdrop of slowly shifting clouds.
